title: KKTN-015 Business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Ai-chan 25 years old Ai Kayama
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is Ai Kayama, the owner of a healing voice. Ai-chan is loved by her cute face, her laughing face is very cute, her screaming face is cute, and her screaming voice is cute. I felt so comfortable on the way and I was about to give up, but he did his best until the end! "I thought it wouldn't come out, but it might come out ~", it's really cute, please put out anything! !!
